title: ctenitis afra
intro: Ctenitis afra, also known as the African fern or bush fern, is a species of flowering plant in the family Dryopteridaceae. The medicinal properties of Ctenitis afra have been studied, and it is found to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to protect against cell damage and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Ctenitis afra include its potential to treat various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Ctenitis afra is typically prepared for medicinal use through herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed as a treatment for various ailments.
